caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and collaboration. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a computer screen showing a visual map or diagram with various interconnected nodes labeled with terms such as "developing models," "model & play," and "no share." A central image emphasizes the concept of "SHARE," surrounded by icons representing different aspects of sharing, such as people, documents, and tools. The overall theme seems to revolve around the process of developing and sharing models within a collaborative framework, possibly in an educational or professional setting. The presenter's gestures and expressions suggest he is explaining the significance of these concepts and their interconnections.
